name: zerlin
description: STX Gas Calculator & Fee Estimator for Stacks Blockchain

scripts.install:all: pnpm install && cd backend && pnpm install && cd ../frontend && pnpm install && cd ../contract && pnpm install
scripts.test: pnpm --filter backend test && pnpm --filter contract test
scripts.build: pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
